cabinets.title: Maze Chase
cabinets.design_notes: Original characters, tribute aesthetics. Canvas 2D. Keyboard + touch.

art.placeholder_alt: Maze-chase cabinet with ember marquee glow

cabinets.placard_copy_md: **Maze Chase** — a tribute to the maze-and-ghost format that defined an arcade generation. The route always closes; the only choice is whether you make it interesting.

cabinets.title: Ape Climb
cabinets.design_notes: Attract loop only in v1. Playable slot reserved for v2+.
cabinets.placard_copy_md: **Ape Climb** — the game that taught the industry a barrel could be a story beat.

cabinets.title: Plumber's Rise
cabinets.placard_copy_md: **Plumber's Rise** — a side-scroll grammar that outlived its own decade.
